name: grouped-data-table
title: Grouped Data Table
description: DEPRECATED — use @kotsas-ui/data-table's grouping prop. AG-Grid-style row grouping/drill-down table built on TanStack Table v8: a single auto group column with indented hierarchy and counts, a drag-and-drop dimension picker, and AND/OR filter groups. Requires a base-ui shadcn setup.

files.content:
export { GroupedDataTable } from "./grouped-data-table"
export { useGroupedTable, type UseGroupedTableResult } from "./use-grouped-table"

// Re-exported from their new homes so existing imports from this barrel keep working.
export {
  GroupAwareCell as GroupCell,
  type GroupAwareCellProps as GroupCellProps,
  GROUP_COLUMN_ID,
  MultiSelect,
  MultiSelectContent,
  multiSelectLabel,
  FilterPopover,
  FilterBuilderContent,
  OPERATOR_LABELS,
  createCondition,
  defaultOperatorsFor,
  describeCondition,
  evaluateCondition,
  operatorsForDef,
  type DimensionDef,
  type GroupColumnConfig,
  type GroupLeafConfig,
  type FilterType,
  type FilterOperator,
  type FilterDef,
  type FilterCondition,
  type FilterValue,
  type Combinator,
  type FilterGroup,
  type FilterState,
  withColumn,
  withOperator,
  withValue,
  evaluateFilterState,
  evaluateGroup,
  emptyFilterState,
  countActiveConditions,
  isConditionComplete,
  newGroup,
  addGroup,
  addConditionToGroup,
  updateConditionInGroup,
  removeConditionFromGroup,
  removeGroup,
  setGroupCombinator,
  setTopCombinator,
  normalizeFilterState,
} from "@/components/data-table"
export { DimensionPicker, DimensionPickerContent, reorderGrouping } from "@/components/dimension-picker"
export type { GroupedDataTableProps } from "./types"
